completed_tasks.name: Phase 10 RESEARCH.md (HIGH confidence, 9 pitfalls, 17 tests, validation architecture)

remaining_tasks.name: Generate VALIDATION.md from RESEARCH.md §Validation Architecture (template at $HOME/.claude/get-shit-done/templates/VALIDATION.md)
Spawn gsd-planner to produce PLAN.md files for Phase 10 (must cover DBUI-01 through DBUI-05)
Spawn gsd-plan-checker to verify plans (revision loop max 3 iterations)
Verify DBUI-01..05 all covered in plan frontmatter
Execute phase: gsd-execute-phase 10 --no-transition (waves of plans with atomic commits)

decisions.decision: Frontend stack: htmx + vanilla JS + vendored dagre-d3, zero build, rust-embed
decisions.rationale: DBUI-05 requires single-binary, no npm, no external files. rust-embed 8.11 with mime-guess + debug-embed feature is the canonical axum path.

decisions.decision: Vendor directory is src/server/ui/ (CONTEXT.md) NOT src/server/static/ (UI-SPEC.md §11)
decisions.rationale: CONTEXT outranks UI-SPEC when they disagree. Researcher flagged this in Open Question 3.

decisions.decision: Two new HTTP endpoints: GET /debug/topology (DAG) and GET /debug/throughput (EWMA per stream)
decisions.rationale: petgraph DAG and per-stream state already exist; only need JSON handlers + EWMA counters in AppState.

decisions.decision: Extend /debug/memory additively (add per_stream array) rather than add new endpoint
decisions.rationale: Existing endpoint is a rollup; UI-SPEC §7.4 needs per-stream bars. Researcher recommendation.
Matches existing stateless HTTP surface, keeps debug UI simple.

decisions.decision: Dark-only theme, 4-size type scale (12/14/20/24), 6-token spacing scale (4/8/16/24/32/48). 12px spacing and 16px typography tokens explicitly prohibited.
decisions.rationale: UI-SPEC checker BLOCKED original spec with 5 font sizes and 12px token; revision fixed both. Final contract passes all 6 dimensions.

decisions.decision: Integration tests use raw TCP (matches tests/test_server.rs pattern), not reqwest
decisions.rationale: Zero-dep ethos, consistent with existing test patterns.

next_action: Resume with /gsd-autonomous --from 10 in a fresh session. Autonomous workflow will detect existing CONTEXT.md + UI-SPEC.md + RESEARCH.md and pick up at the planner step (commit RESEARCH.md first, then generate VALIDATION.md, then gsd-planner, then gsd-plan-checker, then execute).
context_notes: Phase 10 is the last phase of v1.1. Everything pre-plan is done: stack decisions locked in CONTEXT.md, visual/interaction contract locked in approved UI-SPEC.md, technical approach mapped in RESEARCH.md with 9 pitfalls and 17 tests. The planner has a HIGH-confidence blueprint to work from. The ONE flagged risk is dagre-d3 0.6.4 (maintenance mode, last release 2020) paired with d3 v7 — browser smoke test required at vendor time. After Phase 10 ships, the milestone lifecycle (audit → complete → cleanup) runs automatically since /gsd-autonomous handles it. Pause reason: main-context usage hit 90% after the research step; planner call would have exceeded the remaining budget.
